items.name_cn:
✨Leopard Print🐆
♡Bestseller Niki_ Newly Launched Leopard Print Series♡
Using new animal elements, the exquisite pattern craftsmanship perfectly presents a rich retro artistic atmosphere. The overall look is bold and stylish. The bag is practical for both shoulder and crossbody carrying, holds a lot, but is very light. It adds an artistic touch to your look•̀ᴗ-✧
Recommended for fairies who love high-appeal and practical bags🌷
Model: 633151
Size: 22×16.5×12cm

items.name_en: ✨M13397 White & Color. Flap Wallet. New LV x TM Portfolio Sarah NM. A wallet paying tribute to Maison luggage, the 'LV × TM Portfolio Sarah NM'. The slightly rectangular shape features calfskin trimming, with gold screws decorating the corners of the front flap. The playful rainbow-colored letter pattern canvas is exclusive to the reissue of the 'Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami' series. The interior features 2 large compartments and multiple pockets with 12 card slots, which is also very attractive. 19 x 10.5 x 2 cm.

items.name_en: ✨M14194 White Color Mini Baguette Series Nano Diane JhLt Baguette Handbag M14194 White Color (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami) The Nano Diane, crafted from two-tone Monogram Empreinte LT leather, is a miniature version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and a strap-style magnetic closure. Its detachable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options. Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm

items.name_cn:
❑Nano Speedy Mini #M81085# MB Inspection-free Version❒
❥Size: 16*10*7.5cm
The Speedy series condenses classic essence,
With a Mini exquisite and compact shape paired with a detachable shoulder strap design,
The detachable shoulder strap offers different styling interpretations,
Versatile and cute, compared to the old Nano series, the new design is more user-friendly with an adjustable strap to suit different heights. A versatile look!

items.name_cn:
❣️ Montaigne Avenue Bag
This bag features an elegant design that elevates the classic series.
Exquisitely crafted from white patent leather, the rounded flap curves are refined, adorned with vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle.
The back is embossed with the Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel CD links in the same tone as the leather.
Accordion pleat design, spacious, refined silhouette, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Flap closure
CD buckle
Back Montaigne embossed logo
Adjustable chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel CD links in the same tone as the leather, with leather strap
Three compartments
Dimensions: 22
Model: 9261
